title: Jacob Collier in Carré
full_description: Jacob Collier and Metropole Orkest join forces for an intimate evening showcasing his album The Light For Days — which finds the seven-time Grammy winner at his most present and immediate, focused around a single instrument: the acoustic guitar. Solo concerts in intimate venues, stripping his music back to its essence.
ai_summary: Seven-time Grammy winner Jacob Collier brings his most stripped-back show yet to Carré — acoustic guitar centrestage, drawing from The Light For Days and his remarkable catalogue in a solo performance that trades his legendary sonic maximalism for presence, intimacy, and depth.
